question: Maya has 12 stickers. Her friend gives her 4 more stickers. How many stickers does Maya have now?
There are 12 cars in the parking lot. 4 more cars arrive. How many cars are now in the lot?
A baker made 12 cookies in the morning and 4 cookies in the afternoon. How many cookies in total?
Tom collected 12 seashells on Monday and 4 seashells on Tuesday. How many seashells does he have?
A library had 12 books on the shelf. 4 new books were added. How many books are on the shelf now?
A garden has 12 red roses and 4 white roses. How many roses are in the garden total?
Maya has 12 stickers. She gives 4 stickers to her brother. How many stickers does Maya have left?
There are 12 birds on a branch. 4 birds fly away. How many birds are still on the branch?
A baker made 12 cookies. 4 cookies were eaten. How many cookies are left?
Tom had 12 marbles. He lost 4 marbles. How many marbles does he have now?
A library had 12 books on the shelf. 4 books were borrowed. How many books are on the shelf now?
There were 12 candies in a jar. 4 candies were taken out. How many candies remain?
Maya has 12 sticker books. Each book contains 4 stickers. How many stickers does Maya have in total?
There are 12 parking lots. Each lot holds 4 cars. How many cars can be parked in total?
A baker made 12 batches of cookies. Each batch has 4 cookies. How many cookies were made in total?
Tom buys 12 bags of marbles. Each bag has 4 marbles. How many marbles does Tom have?
A library has 12 shelves. Each shelf holds 4 books. How many books does the library have in total?
There are 12 jars of candy. Each jar contains 4 candies. How many candies are there altogether?
Maya has 12 stickers and wants to split them equally among 4 friends. How many stickers does each friend get?
There are 12 cars to be parked equally in 4 parking lots. How many cars per lot?
A baker made 12 cookies and packed them equally into 4 boxes. How many cookies in each box?
Tom has 12 marbles to share equally among 4 bags. How many marbles per bag?
A library has 12 books to put equally on 4 shelves. How many books per shelf?
There are 12 candies to be split equally into 4 bowls. How many candies in each bowl?
